hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Ṣawari awọn demos ibanisọrọ, awọn adanwo, ati awọn iṣafihan imọ-ẹrọ lati ẹgbẹ imọ-ẹrọ wa.

hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: A ṣawari awọn aala ti o wulo ni AI, adaṣe, ati awọn ọna pinpin, lẹhinna tumọ iwadi ti a fọwọsi sinu awọn agbara iṣelọpọ ti o gbẹkẹle.

researchAreas.title: Awọn agbegbe Iwadi
researchAreas.description: Agbegbe idojukọ kọọkan ṣe ajọṣepọ iwadi iwadii pẹlu awọn ọna imuse ti a ṣe apẹrẹ fun awọn eto gidi-aye.

detailedFocusBriefs.title: Awọn alaye Idojukọ Alaye
detailedFocusBriefs.description: Awọn ipilẹṣẹ iwadii ti o sunmọ lọwọlọwọ n lọ lati ifọwọsi faaji si awọn eto ifijiṣẹ.

fromLabToProduction.title: Lati Lab si Iṣelọpọ
fromLabToProduction.description: Innovation ni Horizon ni wiwọn nipasẹ awọn abajade ti a firanṣẹ, kii ṣe awọn apẹẹrẹ ti o ya sọtọ.

roadmap.title: R &D Roadmap
roadmap.description: Ilọsiwaju ipele lati agbara si aṣamubadọgba, imudarasi awọn ọna ṣiṣe nigbagbogbo.

publications.title: Awọn atẹjade ati awọn oye
publications.description: Kikọ imọ-ẹrọ ati awọn akọsilẹ imuse lati iṣẹ imotuntun ti nlọ lọwọ.

appliedAi.title: Awọn ọna ṣiṣe AI ti a lo
appliedAi.description: Awọn faaji AI ti o ni idojukọ iṣelọpọ ti o kọja iṣẹ awoṣe, orchestration ẹya-ara, ati idanwo iṣakoso.

automationFrameworks.title: Awọn ilana adaṣiṣẹ
automationFrameworks.description: Awọn irinṣẹ adaṣe ti abẹnu fun ailewu gbigbe, idahun iṣẹlẹ, ati awọn iṣan-iṣẹ imọ-ẹrọ ti o tun ṣeeṣe.

advancedArchitecture.title: Idanwo faaji to ti ni ilọsiwaju
advancedArchitecture.description: Iwadi sinu awọn faaji ti o ni ilọsiwaju, ti a pin ti iṣapeye fun iṣẹ, ifarada aṣiṣe, ati iwọn.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Ọgbọn ni eti fun ipinnu latency kekere, ṣiṣe telemetry, ati iṣọkan ọkọ oju-omi ẹrọ.

nlp.title: Processing Ede Adayeba
nlp.description: Awọn opo gigun ti oye multilingual fun iyasọtọ, isediwon, itumọ, ati awọn ọna ibaraẹnisọrọ.

evolutionaryAlgorithms.title: Awọn alugoridimu Itankalẹ ati Iṣapeye
evolutionaryAlgorithms.description: Wiwa ati awọn ọna ṣiṣe ti o dara julọ ti o ni atilẹyin nipasẹ yiyan adayeba lati yanju awọn italaya imọ-ẹrọ giga.

automationFrameworks.title: Awọn ilana adaṣiṣẹ
automationFrameworks.description: A n kọ awọn ilana iṣan-iṣẹ ti a le ṣe fun orchestration itusilẹ, awọn ẹnubode didara, ati ijerisi ifiweranṣẹ-ifiranṣẹ lati dinku edekoyede Afowoyi lakoko imudarasi igbẹkẹle.

advancedArchitecture.title: Idanwo faaji to ti ni ilọsiwaju
advancedArchitecture.description: Awọn idanwo faaji wa ni idojukọ lori awọn ilana ibajẹ iṣẹ, awọn ilana imudaniloju agbelebu, ati awọn apoowe iṣẹ fun awọn ọna ṣiṣe ti n ṣiṣẹ labẹ ibeere iyipada.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: A n jẹrisi ṣiṣanwọle iṣẹlẹ ati awọn aṣa inference eti ti o jẹ ki awọn ipinnu agbegbe yiyara lakoko ti o tọju iṣakoso aarin, iṣatunwo, ati iṣakoso igbesi aye awoṣe.

adaptiveCapacityPlanning.title: Eto Agbara Adaptive
adaptiveCapacityPlanning.description: Lab prototypes ti wa ni ifọwọsi lodi si simulated workloads ati ki o si ese sinu Syeed autoscaling ogbon.

operationalIntelligence.title: Operational Intelligence
operationalIntelligence.description: Awọn opo gigun NLP gbe lati awọn adanwo ti a ṣakoso si awọn iṣan-iṣẹ atilẹyin iṣelọpọ fun iyara iyara ati awọn oye ti o han gbangba.

optimizationInDeliverySystems.title: Iṣapeye ni Awọn ọna Ifijiṣẹ
optimizationInDeliverySystems.description: Awọn ọna itankalẹ ti a ṣe idanwo ni laabu ni a tumọ si awọn ẹrọ iṣapeye fun iṣeto ati pinpin.

edgeDecisioning.title: Ipinnu Edge
edgeDecisioning.description: IoT ati awọn idanwo inference eti ti wa ni lile sinu awọn iṣẹ latency kekere pẹlu awọn ihamọ igbẹkẹle ti o muna.

now.title: Awọn ipilẹ AI ti a lo
now.description: Faagun awọn awoṣe awoṣe ti o le tunlo, awọn suites igbelewọn, ati awọn ajohunše akiyesi kọja awọn ẹgbẹ ọja.

next.title: Awọn iṣan-iṣẹ Imọ-ẹrọ Adase
next.description: Ṣiṣẹ awọn ilana adaṣe ti o dinku eewu imuṣiṣẹ ati kuru awọn losiwajulosehin esi fun gbigbe.

twelveToEighteenMonths.title: Ọgbọn Eti-abinibi
twelveToEighteenMonths.description: Asekale arabara awọsanma-eti faaji fun sunmọ gidi-akoko inference ni latency-kókó agbegbe.

longHorizon.title: Awọn ọna ṣiṣe ti o dara ju lemọlemọfún
longHorizon.description: Ṣọkan idanwo, ibojuwo, ati iṣapeye ki awọn ọna ṣiṣe le ṣe deede lailewu bi awọn ipo ṣe yipada.

aiReliability.title: Awọn ọna ṣiṣe AI ti o gbẹkẹle ni iṣelọpọ
aiReliability.summary: A wulo irisi lori iwontunwonsi experimentation iyara pẹlu gbóògì isakoso.

distributedArchitecturePatterns.title: Awọn ilana faaji ti a pin fun awọn iru ẹrọ idagbasoke giga
distributedArchitecturePatterns.summary: Awọn akọsilẹ aaye lati awọn idanwo faaji ni idojukọ lori iṣẹ, imudaniloju, ati ayedero iṣẹ.

roadmappingAppliedRd.title: Roadmapping Applied R&D fun Awọn abajade Iṣowo
roadmappingAppliedRd.summary: Bawo ni a ṣe ṣe agbekalẹ awọn ipilẹṣẹ imotuntun ki awọn awari gbe lati apẹrẹ si iye wiwọn.

cta.title: Kọ pẹlu Horizon Innovation Lab
cta.description: Alabaṣepọ pẹlu wa lati jẹrisi awọn imọran ifẹkufẹ ni kiakia ati gbe awọn imọran ti a fihan sinu aabo, awọn eto iṣelọpọ ti o ni aabo.

hero.title: Awọn ọna ṣiṣe AI ti a lo
hero.description: Akopọ ti o wulo ti bii Horizon ṣe ṣe apẹrẹ, firanṣẹ, ati ṣiṣẹ awọn eto ẹkọ ẹrọ lati afọwọkọ si iṣelọpọ.

machineLearningPipelines.title: Awọn opo gigun ti Ẹkọ Ẹrọ
machineLearningPipelines.description: Iṣelọpọ AI bẹrẹ pẹlu awọn opo gigun ti o sopọ mọ data, idanwo, ifọwọsi, ati esi.

modelDeploymentPatterns.title: Awọn ilana imuṣiṣẹ awoṣe
modelDeploymentPatterns.description: Ilana imuṣiṣẹ ni a yan da lori awọn ibeere latency, iṣowo, ati idiju iṣẹ.

mlopsOperatingModel.title: Awoṣe Ọna MLOps
mlopsOperatingModel.description: Awọn iṣe MLOps rii daju pe awọn eto AI wa ni igbẹkẹle, ijọba, ati iwọn bi lilo ṣe n dagba.

monitoringAndReliability.title: Abojuwo ati igbẹkẹle
monitoringAndReliability.description: Observability pa lupu laarin ihuwasi awoṣe ati awọn abajade iṣẹ.

dataAndFeatureEngineering.title: Data ati Ẹya-ara Engineering
dataAndFeatureEngineering.description: Ingestion data ti a ṣe atunṣe, awọn sọwedowo didara, ati awọn asọye ẹya ti a tunlo ṣẹda ipilẹ ti o gbẹkẹle fun ikẹkọ awoṣe.

modelDevelopment.title: Idagbasoke awoṣe
modelDevelopment.description: Awọn adanwo ni a tọpinpin pẹlu awọn atunto atunto atunṣe, awọn iṣiro ibi-afẹde, ati awọn ipilẹ lafiwe adaṣe.

validationAndSafetyGates.title: Imudaniloju ati Awọn ẹnubode Aabo
validationAndSafetyGates.description: Awọn awoṣe oludije kọja iṣẹ, lagbara, ati awọn sọwedowo eto imulo ṣaaju ki wọn to fọwọsi fun itusilẹ.

operationalFeedbackLoops.title: Operational Feedback Loops
operationalFeedbackLoops.description: Telemetry ifiweranṣẹ-ifilọlẹ ṣe alaye awọn ipinnu atunkọ, awọn ipinnu rollback, ati eto iteration atẹle.

realTimeInferenceServices.title: Awọn iṣẹ Inference Real-Time
realTimeInferenceServices.description: Awọn API latency kekere fun awọn ohun elo ibanisọrọ pẹlu aifọwọyi, caching, ati akiyesi ipele ibeere.

batchAndStreamingPredictions.title: Ipele ati awọn asọtẹlẹ ṣiṣanwọle
batchAndStreamingPredictions.description: Awọn opo gigun ti a ṣeto ati iṣẹlẹ fun igbelewọn iwọn didun giga kọja awọn atupale ati awọn iṣẹ ṣiṣe.

edgeAwareDeployment.title: Imuṣiṣẹ Edge-Aware
edgeAwareDeployment.description: Awọn ilana iranṣẹ awọsanma arabara fun awọn agbegbe ti o nilo inference agbegbe ati iṣakoso awoṣe aarin.

ciCdForModels.title: CI / CD fun awọn awoṣe
ciCdForModels.description: Laifọwọyi kọ, idanwo, ati tu workflows dinku imuṣiṣẹ ewu nigba ti fifipamọ ifijiṣẹ iyara.

modelRegistryAndLifecycle.title: Iforukọsilẹ awoṣe ati igbesi aye
modelRegistryAndLifecycle.description: Awọn ohun elo awoṣe ti a ṣe pẹlu awọn ipele igbega, ila, ati awọn iṣan-iṣẹ itẹwọgba mu iṣakoso ati traceability.

servingInfrastructure.title: Sin amayederun
servingInfrastructure.description: Awọn fẹlẹfẹlẹ iṣiṣẹ ti o ni iwọn pẹlu awọn ọgbọn yiyi bii canary ati awọn imuṣiṣẹ ojiji ṣe atilẹyin iṣakoso iyipada ailewu.

monitoringPillars.latencyThroughputAndCostEfficiencyTracki: Latency, throughput, ati iye owo ṣiṣe titele
monitoringPillars.dataQualityRegressionAlertsAndRemediatio: Awọn itaniji atunyẹwo didara data ati awọn iṣan-iṣẹ atunṣe
monitoringPillars.auditabilityForComplianceAndIncidentAnal: Auditability fun ibamu ati onínọmbà iṣẹlẹ

cta.title: Asekale Applied AI pẹlu Igbẹkẹle
cta.description: Ti o ba n gbero awọn ipilẹṣẹ AI ti o nilo awọn abajade wiwọn ati itọju igba pipẹ, Horizon le ṣe iranlọwọ lati ṣe apẹrẹ ati ṣiṣe igbesi aye eto ni kikun.

hero.title: NLP Ọpọlọpọ-ede
hero.description: Ṣawari awọn agbara iṣelọpọ ede adayeba ti o wulo ati bii wọn ṣe ṣe iwọn sinu igbẹkẹle, awọn eto iṣelọpọ ede pupọ.

foundations.title: Awọn ipilẹ NLP
foundations.description: Ṣiṣe ede adayeba daapọ awọn ifihan agbara ede ati ẹkọ ẹrọ lati yọ itumọ, idi, ati eto lati ọrọ.

workbench.title: Ibanisọrọ NLP Workbench
workbench.description: Lo demo lati ṣe idanwo iṣawari ede, iṣiro imolara, isediwon ẹya, ati awọn ihuwasi itumọ ni akoko gidi.

productionApplications.title: Bawo ni Horizon Ṣe Lo NLP ni Iṣelọpọ
productionApplications.description: Awọn agbara NLP ti ṣepọ sinu awọn iṣan-iṣẹ iṣowo pẹlu awọn aabo iṣẹ ati awọn iṣiro didara ti o han gbangba.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: Igbẹkẹle ati Awọn Ilana Ijọba
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: Iṣelọpọ NLP nilo diẹ sii ju didara awoṣe lọ; O da lori awọn iṣe ifilọlẹ ailewu ati ijẹrisi lemọlemọfún.

foundations.intro1: Awọn ọna NLP ti ode oni ṣe agbara atilẹyin adaṣe, ibaramu wiwa, isediwon imọ, ati ifowosowopo ede pupọ. Imuse ti o munadoko nilo didara awoṣe mejeeji ati awọn iṣakoso iṣẹ to lagbara.
foundations.intro2: Ni Horizon, a fojusi lori awọn ọna NLP opin-si-opin ti o darapọ mọ inference ti o lagbara pẹlu akiyesi, iṣakoso, ati ipa iṣelọpọ wiwọn.

languageDetection.title: Erin ede
languageDetection.description: Ṣe idanimọ ede lati awọn apa ọrọ kukuru tabi gigun lati ṣe itọsọna awọn ibeere sinu opo gigun ti o tọ.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Onínọmbà Sentiment
sentimentAnalysis.description: Yọ ero ẹdun ati polarity fun oye alabara, triage atilẹyin, ati awọn losiwajulosehin esi ọja.

entityExtraction.title: Isediwon Nkan
entityExtraction.description: Ṣe awari awọn nkan ti a ṣeto gẹgẹbi awọn orukọ, awọn ile-iṣẹ, awọn ipo, ati awọn ọjọ lati ọrọ ti a ko ṣeto.

translation.title: Itumọ
translation.description: Ṣe atilẹyin awọn iṣan-iṣẹ multilingual nipa itumọ ọrọ ti ipilẹṣẹ olumulo tabi ọrọ iṣiṣẹ lakoko idaduro ipo.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Atilẹyin ati Imọye Tiketi
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Ṣe iyasọtọ awọn ibeere ti nwọle nipasẹ kiakia, ifẹkufẹ, ati itara lati mu iyara itọsọna ati didara idahun.

governedContentOperations.title: Awọn iṣẹ akoonu ti a ṣe akoso
governedContentOperations.description: Lo awọn ajọ ede ti o mọ eto imulo ati awọn sọwedowo iwọntunwọnsi pẹlu deede wiwọn ati awọn ibi-afẹde iranti.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Awọn imọran Iṣowo Ọrọ
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Ṣajọpọ awọn aṣa lati awọn iwe aṣẹ, awọn atunyẹwo, ati awọn ibaraẹnisọrọ lati sọ fun ilana ati awọn ipinnu iṣẹ.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Igbelewọn nipasẹ Lilo Case
evaluationByUseCase.description: Awọn awoṣe ti wa ni benchmarked lodi si ašẹ-pato datasets ṣaaju ki o to tu ipinnu ti wa ni ṣe.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Awọn aabo eniyan-ni-ni-Loop
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: Awọn asọtẹlẹ ti o ni ipa giga pẹlu awọn ọna atunyẹwo, awọn ofin igbesoke, ati awọn ifihan agbara igbẹkẹle ti o han gbangba.

continuousMonitoring.title: Abojuto lemọlemọfún
continuousMonitoring.description: Drift, latency, ati ibajẹ didara ni a tọpinpin nigbagbogbo nitorinaa atunkọ ati yiyi pada jẹ proactive.

hero.title: Jiini alugoridimu kikopa
hero.description: Ṣawari iṣiro itankalẹ ni agbegbe ibanisọrọ ati wo bi awọn ilana kanna ṣe tumọ si awọn ọna ṣiṣe iṣapeye iṣelọpọ.

scientificFoundation.title: Ipilẹ Imọ-jinlẹ
scientificFoundation.description: Awọn alugoridimu jiini jẹ awọn ọna iṣapeye ti o da lori olugbe ti o ni atilẹyin nipasẹ yiyan adayeba ati aṣamubadọgba.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Ayika Itankalẹ Ibaraenisepo
interactiveEnvironment.description: Ṣiṣe awọn kikopa lati ri amọdaju ti mu iran nipa iran ki o si wo bi aṣayan titẹ ni ipa awọn iyọrisi.

productionUse.title: Bawo ni Horizon ṣe nlo eyi ni iṣelọpọ
productionUse.description: Awọn isiseero wiwa kanna ti a lo ninu demo yii ṣe alaye awọn opo gigun ti o dara julọ ti a firanṣẹ ni awọn ọna ṣiṣe ṣiṣe.

applicationDomains.title: Awọn ibugbe Ohun elo ti o gbooro sii
applicationDomains.description: Iṣapeye itankalẹ jẹ pataki julọ ni awọn ọna ṣiṣe pẹlu awọn ibi-afẹde ti o lagbara ati awọn idiwọn ti o tako.

scientificFoundation.intro1: Dipo wiwa ojutu kan ni akoko kan, awọn alugoridimu jiini ṣe agbekalẹ olugbe oriṣiriṣi ti awọn oludije. Iran kọọkan ni a ṣe ayẹwo lodi si iṣẹ amọdaju ati isọdọtun nipasẹ yiyan, agbelebu, ati iyipada.
scientificFoundation.intro2: Eyi jẹ ki wọn munadoko fun awọn iṣoro ti o ga julọ pẹlu awọn idiwọ ti kii ṣe laini, nibiti awọn ọna ipinnu di brittle tabi iṣiro gbowolori.

selection.title: Àṣàyàn
selection.description: Awọn oludije ti o ni agbara giga ni o ṣeeṣe lati yọ ninu ewu ati ni ipa lori iran ti n bọ.

crossover.title: Agbelebu
crossover.description: Awọn abuda ti o lagbara ni a tun ṣe atunṣe lati ṣẹda awọn solusan oludije tuntun pẹlu awọn agbara adalu.

mutation.title: Iyipada
mutation.description: Iṣakoso randomness ṣafihan oniruuru ki wiwa ko ni duro ni ayika agbegbe optima.

convergence.title: Iṣọpọ
convergence.description: Ni ọpọlọpọ awọn iran, awọn eniyan n lọ si iduroṣinṣin, awọn solusan didara giga.

resourceScheduling.title: Eto Awọn orisun
resourceScheduling.description: A lo awọn ọgbọn itankalẹ lati mu iṣeto ihamọ pupọ pọ si nibiti wiwa agbara ko ṣeeṣe.

architectureTuning.title: Faaji Tuning
architectureTuning.description: Awọn atunto amayederun oludije ni a ṣe ayẹwo iteratively lati mu iṣẹ ati ṣiṣe iye owo dara si.

continuousOptimization.title: Iṣapeye lemọlemọfún
continuousOptimization.description: Awọn iṣẹ iṣapeye ṣiṣe ni awọn losiwajulosehin ti a ṣakoso pẹlu esi telemetry ki awọn ọna ṣiṣe ṣe deede bi awọn profaili eletan ṣe yipada.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Ọna ati Eekaderi Eto
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Ifijiṣẹ ti o nira ati eto fifiranṣẹ ni anfani lati wiwa itankalẹ nigbati awọn idiwọ yipada ni kiakia.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Awoṣe ati Wiwa Hyperparameter
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: Wiwa jiini le ṣe awari awọn atunto awoṣe ti o ga julọ nigbati awọn aaye ibi-afẹde jẹ ariwo ati ti kii ṣe laini.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Portfolio ati awọn iṣoro ipin
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Iṣapeye labẹ awọn ibi-afẹde idije le ṣee ṣe bi awọn iṣowo amọdaju kọja awọn ipilẹ oludije ti n dagbasoke.
